title: Déclaration britannique relative à la non application des dispositions de la convention  concernant l'établissement et la compétence judiciaire aux territoires des dominions britanniques
text_preview: • In accordance with the provisions of Article 19 of the Convention respecting Conditions of Residence and Business and Jurisdiction, signed at Lausanne on July 24th, 1923, the Undersigned, His Britannie Majesty's Minister Plenipotentiary to the French Republic, duly authorised by HIs Britannie Majesty'for that purpose, hereby declares that the provisions of the sald Convention do not a ply to any of the following o…

pages.text:
•

In accordance with the provisions of Article

19 of the Convention respecting Conditions of Residence and Business and Jurisdiction, signed at Lausanne on July 24th, 1923, the Undersigned, His Britannie Majesty's

Minister Plenipotentiary to the French Republic, duly authorised by HIs Britannie Majesty'for that purpose, hereby declares that the provisions of the sald Convention do not a ply to any of the following of His Britannic

Majesty's Dominions enjoying responsible Government, colonles, possessions, protectorates or territories sub- Ject to HIs Majesty's soverelgnty or authority.

Canada.

Union of South Africa.

Mandated territory of South-West'Africa.

Irish Free State.

Bahamas.

Gibraltar.

Sierra Leone,

FIJI.

Gilbert and Ellice Islands Colony.

Tonga.

Basutoland.

Bechuanaland Protectorate.

Swaziland.

Northern Rhodesia.

Anglo-Egyptian Sudan.

Straits Settlements.

Mandated territory of Nauru.

In....

1

In witness whereof the Undersigned has signed the present Declaration and affixed thereto the seal of his arms.

Done at Paris, this second day or anguist, 1024.

4

Eric Prippo
